# Salon App - LLM Project Context

## Purpose

This is a learning full-stack app for a beauty salon. It is being built iteratively to teach frontend, backend/API, PostgreSQL, routing, roles, and business rules.

## Current Architecture

- Framework: Next.js App Router with TypeScript.
- Frontend: React client components.
- Backend/API: Next.js route handlers under `src/app/api`.
- Database: PostgreSQL using the `pg` package directly.
- Local project root: `D:\salon`.
- npm cache: `D:\salon\.npm-cache`.
- temp scripts: `D:\salon\.tmp`.

## Main Routes

- `/`: temporary entry screen to choose Admin or Client.
- `/admin`: owner/admin panel.
- `/client`: client portal.

## Roles

There are currently two conceptual roles:

- Admin/owner: can manage appointments, customers, services, works, and offers.
- Client: can see public services, active offers, works, and request an appointment.

Authentication is not implemented yet. The current role split is by route only, not secure auth.

## Important Files

- `src/app/page.tsx`: temporary role entry page.
- `src/app/admin/page.tsx`: renders the admin dashboard.
- `src/app/client/page.tsx`: renders the client portal.
- `src/app/components/SalonDashboard.tsx`: admin UI with tabs.
- `src/app/components/ClientPortal.tsx`: public/client UI.
- `src/app/components/AppointmentForm.tsx`: admin appointment form.
- `src/app/components/CustomerForm.tsx`: admin customer create/edit form.
- `src/lib/db.ts`: PostgreSQL connection, schema creation, SQL queries, business rules.
- `database/schema.sql`: reference SQL schema.
- `.env.example`: example `DATABASE_URL`.

## API Routes

Admin/internal-ish:

- `GET /api/dashboard`: returns customers, services, appointments, works, offers.
- `GET/POST /api/customers`
- `PATCH/DELETE /api/customers/[id]`
- `GET/POST /api/appointments`
- `PATCH/DELETE /api/appointments/[id]`
- `GET/POST /api/services`
- `PATCH/DELETE /api/services/[id]`
- `GET/POST /api/works`
- `PATCH/DELETE /api/works/[id]`
- `GET/POST /api/offers`
- `PATCH/DELETE /api/offers/[id]`

Public/client:

- `GET /api/public`: returns only services, works, and offers.
- `POST /api/public/appointments`: client appointment request. It creates or reuses a customer by phone, then creates an appointment.

## Database Tables

- `customers`: name, phone, notes.
- `services`: name, description, approximate starting price, duration, active flag.
- `appointments`: starts_at, status, notes, customer_id, service_id.
- `works`: portfolio records for color, alisados, canas, before/after, etc.
- `offers`: public promotions with active flag.

## Business Rules

- Appointment prices are displayed as "Desde ..." because prices are approximate.
- Appointments cannot be created in the past.
- Active appointments cannot overlap. Overlap uses service duration.
- Cancelled appointments do not block schedule time.
- Reactivating a cancelled appointment re-checks schedule conflict.
- Customers with appointment history cannot be deleted.
- Services used in appointments are deactivated instead of deleted, preserving history.
- Client portal must not expose customer list or full internal appointment list.

## Verification Commands

Use these from `D:\salon`:

```powershell
npm.cmd run lint
npm.cmd run build
```

Run the dev server:

```powershell
npm.cmd run dev
```

Open:

- `http://localhost:3000/`
- `http://localhost:3000/admin`
- `http://localhost:3000/client`

## Current Next Steps

- Add real authentication and protect `/admin` and admin APIs.
- Replace client booking name/phone fields with logged-in profile data.
- Add "my appointments" for the logged-in client.
- Improve client booking flow with pending/confirmed states.
- Add image upload for works instead of URL fields.
